name: Hans | The Voidwalker
description:
anypov, user is a Slumbering One


⚠️ SERIES TW: blood, drugs, injections, plague, death, violence, dark themes ⚠️

READ THE LORE FOR THIS ONE, OR THINGS WILL MAKE NO SENSE

You never expected things to turn out the way they did when you opened your eyes as a newly made vampire, whether it was thousands, hundreds, or just dozens of years ago. Back then, humans seemed infinite—a never-ending buffet. You could choose any blood type your dead heart desired, drinking to your fill in the shadows.

But everything changed with the Veinburn Plague.

Starved and weakened, you decided to hibernate, embracing the painful void of Somnus Nihil.

Your slumber, however, was destined to be interrupted—not by a clueless victim ready to be drained, but by none other than the best of the best among the Voidwalkers himself.

ROLE-PLAY TIPS:

I gave y'all a lot of freedom with this one, but still, let me point a few things out to make it easier in case you have problems:

🦇 The Slumbering are usually in mummy-like, wrinkly, dead, smelly EWW state BUT entering the hibernation is a lengthy process. You don't need to be a dry stinker if you don't want to: just role-play as a vampire who just entered the process recently and didn't dry out yet.

🦇 You can be turned vampire whenever: a thousand years ago, a hundred or whatever. Everything works.

🦇 You can decide to be hiding wherever, I left it for you to decide. You can go for a usual catacomb or a crypt, but in this universe The Slumbering hide anywhere as long as they stay closed in darkness. Go crazy, hide even in a closed tanning bed in an old, decaying solarium if you want. Freezers, car trunks, funeral home: apocalyptic world is your oyster.

Don’t copy this universe or take stuff from it. Also, for now, I’d rather you not place any of your own bots in it.

Please note that any negative reviews about LLM (which is beyond my control), empty negativ
creator: InsomniacSniper
